pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-S-012 (Technical Foundations/Skill) scores 0.416 composite (highest: DCWF at 0.416) and is in_scope for the Data Engineer role. The KSA covers data modeling, schema design, and database work that are core Data Engineer competencies. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with in_scope scope, DCWF signal (0.416), and Technical Foundations handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does DCWF signal (0.416) for this Technical Foundations KSA reflect actual Data Engineer hiring requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Technical Foundations appears in 60-85% of senior Data Engineer job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at IC-to-senior IC level across major platforms.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Technical Foundations at composite 0.416 is market-validated for Data Engineer IC/senior IC. Final decision: include.
